Name: CRED-1: NAA credentials recoverable from policy
description: The Network Access Account credentials can be recovered from SCCM client policy by any authenticated domain user. The NAA has domain user privileges which enables lateral movement.
remediation: Replace NAA with Enhanced HTTP or configure a CMG for internet-based content access

Name: EXEC-1: Client push to domain controllers
description: Client push installation is configured with an account that has local admin rights on domain controllers. An attacker who compromises the SCCM site can execute code on DCs via client push.
remediation: Exclude domain controllers from client push scope and use manual or GP-based client installation for DCs

Name: RECON-1: Anonymous access to SMS Provider
description: The SMS Provider WMI namespace allows anonymous read access, enabling unauthenticated enumeration of SCCM site configuration, collections, and deployment targets.
remediation: Restrict SMS Provider WMI namespace permissions and enable HTTPS-only administration service
